patient_summary: 73-year-old female (patient ID 104) with documented mixed dyslipidemia (listed as Primary), essential hypertension (benign), postoperative/un­specific anemia, and a diagnosis entry of hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. Significant laboratory abnormalities on 07/03/2023 include Ferritin 266.8 (H), Iron 41 (L) with Iron Saturation 15% (L), triglycerides 158 (H), VLDL 32 (H), and eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L). A COLONOSCOPY WITH BIOPSY was scheduled/performed on 02/21/2025 with Haroon, Mustafa, MD. Care team members include Hand, Hoyet A, MD (PCP) and multiple Piedmont specialists. Social history and demographic fields contain conflicting entries across sources (see conflicts). Recent PHQ scores documented as 0 (03/28/2023) and 3 (11/17/2020).
